title: The Missed Call
content: Oliver looked at his phone and noticed a missed call from Lily. He quickly called her back, worried that something had happened. Lily answered with a laugh and said it was nothing serious. She had simply wanted to invite him to a concert in the park that evening. Oliver happily accepted. They listened to live music under the stars and shared ice cream while singing their favorite songs. Oliver smiled when he realized that missing one call had led to a perfect night together.
